settings.description_text: Nourish your skin with our premium beauty essentials. Hydration, care, and radiance in every touch.
Matte is designed for those who crave balance—deep moisture without the shine.
Discover the essence of radiant beauty with Normcore. Our skincare and beauty essentials are crafted to nourish, hydrate, and enhance your skin’s natural brilliance.

settings.heading: Proven by science
settings.description: ION* Gut Support has been scientifically proven to strengthen the gut lining by sealing cell junctions, even in the presence of harmful toxins. This helps to combat intestinal permeability, thereby protecting the immune system, improving digestion, and supporting a healthy microbiome

settings.review_content: I’ve tried so many skincare brands, but this one truly stands out! The texture is lightweight yet deeply hydrating, and the scent is so refreshing. Definitely a must-have in my routine!
This serum is a miracle! My skin feels softer, looks brighter, and the glow is real. I’m obsessed!

I’ve been searching for the perfect lipstick, and I finally found it! The formula is long-lasting without feeling dry, and the pigmentation is stunning. I love how it stays on throughout the day, even after meals.
Self-care is a huge part of my daily routine, and these products make it even more enjoyable I’ve already recommended it to all my friends!
The perfect moisturizer! Lightweight, super hydrating, and smells amazing. My skin has never felt better.
This serum is a miracle! My skin feels softer, looks brighter, and the glow is real. I’m obsessed!

settings.description_text: Explore high-quality articles from our team of beauty and wellness experts. Get professional tips, skincare routines, and the latest trends to elevate your self-care journey.

settings.description_faq_item: Yes, we ship all over the world. Shipping costs will apply and will be calculated at checkout. Please check our shipping policy for detailed information about delivery times and costs.

settings.heading_faq_item: Do I need an account to shop?
settings.description_faq_item:
No, you can shop as a guest. However, creating an account lets you save your favorite items, view your order history,
track orders easily, and receive exclusive updates and offers.
We accept returns within 14 days of delivery for items that are unworn, unwashed, and in their original packaging with tags intact.

settings.heading_faq_item: Can I make a purchase from multiple vendors in one order?
settings.description_faq_item: Absolutely! Our platform allows you to shop across different product categories and complete your purchase in a single checkout process.

settings.heading_faq_item: Can I cancel or change my order?
settings.description_faq_item: You can cancel or modify your order before it is processed by contacting our support team. Unfortunately, once the order is shipped, changes or cancellations are no longer possible.
